events.name: Los Angeles Lakers at Boston Celtics

headlines.description: — Jaylen Brown had 30 points, eight rebounds and eight assists and the Boston Celtics cruised past Los Angeles 126-105 on Friday night, with the Lakers playing without LeBron James and Luka Doncic.
headlines.shortLinkText: Brown scores 30 points, Celtics cruise to 126-105 win over Lakers team missing James, Doncic
